goals.title: Reduce Orchestration Overhead
goals.description: Reduce orchestration overhead and token use for each task
goals.success_criteria: Single orchestration plane with minimal token consumption per task cycle
goals.verification_method: Measure token usage before/after; verify single Pipeline/Loop core exists

goals.title: Stabilize Run Loop
goals.description: Stabilize run loop and self-healing (avoid false stalls, improve retries)
goals.success_criteria: Heartbeat-based stall detection with dynamic thresholds; no false-positive stalls
goals.verification_method: Run loop under simulated delays; verify stall detection triggers correctly

goals.title: Unified State and Actions
goals.description: Improve determinism and recovery by unifying state and actions
goals.success_criteria: SQLite is canonical state; typed action schemas replace text heuristics
goals.verification_method: Verify all state reads from SQLite; validate action schema parsing

goals.title: Safe Reviewable Code Changes
goals.description: Enforce safe, reviewable code changes via diffs scoped to the repo
goals.success_criteria: All code edits use deterministic diff/patch application within workspace_root
goals.verification_method: Verify patches apply cleanly; check no writes outside workspace_root

goals.title: Soft-Fail Verification
goals.description: Maintain usability with soft-fail verification when builds/tests fail
goals.success_criteria: Build failures captured as diagnostics; loop continues with smaller safe changes
goals.verification_method: Simulate build failure; verify loop records diagnostics and advances

stories.title: Codebase Study & Mapping
stories.description: As an engineer, I need to understand the existing OpenExec architecture so that I can safely refactor without breaking functionality
acceptance_criteria: Document current orchestration planes (Pipeline, Loop, DCP)
Map SQLite schema and JSON artifact relationships
Identify all text heuristic parsing locations
Document current diff/patch mechanisms
Map stall detection and retry logic

tasks.title: Chassis: Map Orchestration Architecture
tasks.description: Study and document Pipeline, Loop, and DCP components including their interactions and responsibilities
tasks.technical_strategy: Read internal/pipeline/, internal/loop/, and internal/dcp/ directories. Document component responsibilities, interfaces, and data flow in .openexec/engram/architecture_map.md. Use safe_commit --story US-000 --task T-US-000-001 to persist findings.

tasks.title: Chassis: Map State Management
tasks.description: Document SQLite schema, JSON artifacts, and their relationships
tasks.technical_strategy: Analyze internal/db/, internal/audit/, and any JSON serialization points. Document schema in architecture_map.md with table relationships and artifact dependencies. Use safe_commit --story US-000 --task T-US-000-002 to persist findings.

tasks.title: Chassis: Map Action Routing and Tool Control
tasks.description: Identify text heuristic parsing locations and current action routing mechanisms
tasks.technical_strategy: Search for string parsing, regex matching, and action dispatch in internal/. Document each heuristic location and its purpose in architecture_map.md. Use safe_commit --story US-000 --task T-US-000-003 to persist findings.

stories.title: Collapse Orchestration Planes
stories.description: As a developer, I want a single orchestration plane (Pipeline/Loop as core) so that DCP becomes a thin local-tools adapter, reducing overhead
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline/Loop is the single orchestration core
DCP functions only as local-tools adapter
No duplicate orchestration logic exists
Build completes successfully (soft-fail acceptable)

tasks.title: Diagnose: Identify Orchestration Overlap
tasks.description: Identify overlapping responsibilities between Pipeline, Loop, and DCP based on study findings
tasks.technical_strategy: Using architecture_map.md, identify duplicated orchestration logic between components. Create a consolidation plan documenting what moves where. Use safe_commit --story US-001 --task T-US-001-001 to persist diagnosis.

tasks.title: Implement: Refactor DCP to Thin Adapter
tasks.description: Remove orchestration logic from DCP, keeping only local-tools adapter functionality
tasks.technical_strategy: Move orchestration logic from DCP to Pipeline/Loop per consolidation plan. DCP should only translate local tool calls. Use safe_commit --story US-001 --task T-US-001-002 after each verified refactor step.

tasks.title: Verify: Orchestration Consolidation
tasks.description: Verify single orchestration plane is functional and build succeeds
tasks.technical_strategy: Run full build and targeted tests on Pipeline/Loop integration. Verify DCP only handles tool translation. Use safe_commit --story US-001 --task T-US-001-003 to finalize.
tasks.verification_script: go build ./... && go test ./internal/... -run Pipeline|Loop || echo verify-soft-fail

stories.title: SQLite Canonical State
stories.description: As a developer, I want SQLite as the canonical state source so that JSON artifacts become read-only exports or are phased out
acceptance_criteria: All state reads come from SQLite
JSON artifacts are read-only exports only
Session and Audit tests pass (soft-fail acceptable)

tasks.title: Diagnose: Map JSON to SQLite Migration
tasks.description: Identify all JSON artifact usage and plan migration to SQLite-first reads
tasks.technical_strategy: Search for JSON file reads/writes in internal/. Document each usage and its SQLite equivalent table/column. Use safe_commit --story US-002 --task T-US-002-001 to persist migration map.

tasks.title: Implement: Migrate State Reads to SQLite
tasks.description: Refactor code to read state from SQLite instead of JSON artifacts
tasks.technical_strategy: Update state-reading functions to query SQLite. JSON writes become optional exports triggered explicitly. Use safe_commit --story US-002 --task T-US-002-002 after each migration chunk.

tasks.title: Verify: SQLite State Integrity
tasks.description: Verify all state operations use SQLite and tests pass
tasks.technical_strategy: Run Session and Audit tests to verify SQLite operations. Confirm no JSON reads for canonical state. Use safe_commit --story US-002 --task T-US-002-003 to finalize.

stories.title: Typed Action Schemas
stories.description: As a developer, I want typed action schemas for routing and tool control so that text heuristics are replaced with deterministic parsing
acceptance_criteria: Action schemas defined as Go structs with JSON tags
All action routing uses typed schema parsing
No text heuristics for action detection

tasks.title: Chassis: Define Action Schema Types
tasks.description: Create Go struct definitions for all action types with JSON serialization
tasks.technical_strategy: Based on architecture_map.md heuristic locations, define typed Action structs in internal/action/schema.go. Include validation methods and JSON tags. Use safe_commit --story US-003 --task T-US-003-001 to persist schema definitions.
tasks.verification_script: test -f internal/action/schema.go && go build ./internal/action/... || echo schema-build-soft-fail

tasks.title: Chassis: Replace Heuristics with Schema Parsing
tasks.description: Replace text heuristic parsing with typed schema unmarshal calls
tasks.technical_strategy: Find each heuristic location from architecture_map.md. Replace string parsing with json.Unmarshal into typed structs. Use safe_commit --story US-003 --task T-US-003-002 after each replacement.
tasks.verification_script: go build ./internal/... && go test ./internal/action/... || echo action-soft-fail

stories.title: Deterministic Diff/Patch Application
stories.description: As a developer, I want code edits to use deterministic diff/patch application scoped to workspace_root so that changes are safe and reviewable
acceptance_criteria: All code edits generate and apply unified diffs
Edits are scoped to workspace_root only
Patches can be reviewed before application
stories.verification_script: git diff --quiet || echo patch-applied; test -d . || echo workspace-root

tasks.title: Chassis: Implement Diff Generator
tasks.description: Create diff generation utility that produces unified diffs for code changes
tasks.technical_strategy: Implement internal/patch/diff.go with functions to generate unified diffs between old and new content. Ensure workspace_root scoping validation. Use safe_commit --story US-004 --task T-US-004-001 to persist implementation.
tasks.verification_script: test -f internal/patch/diff.go && go build ./internal/patch/... || echo diff-build-soft-fail

tasks.title: Chassis: Implement Patch Applicator
tasks.description: Create patch application utility that applies unified diffs deterministically
tasks.technical_strategy: Implement internal/patch/apply.go with functions to parse and apply unified diffs. Validate target paths are within workspace_root before writing. Use safe_commit --story US-004 --task T-US-004-002 to persist implementation.
tasks.verification_script: test -f internal/patch/apply.go && go build ./internal/patch/... || echo apply-build-soft-fail

tasks.title: Chassis: Integrate Patch System with Tools
tasks.description: Update tool handlers to use diff/patch system instead of direct file writes
tasks.technical_strategy: Modify file editing tools in internal/tools/ to use patch package. All writes go through patch applicator with workspace_root validation. Use safe_commit --story US-004 --task T-US-004-003 to finalize integration.
tasks.verification_script: go build ./internal/tools/... && go test ./internal/patch/... || echo patch-integration-soft-fail

stories.title: Prompt Cost Reduction and Stall Detection
stories.description: As a developer, I want reduced prompt costs and heartbeat-based stall detection so that the system is efficient and self-healing
acceptance_criteria: System/briefing blocks are cached to reduce token usage
History windowing limits context size
Heartbeat-based stall detection with dynamic thresholds
CLI version command works

tasks.title: Chassis: Implement Prompt Caching
tasks.description: Add caching for system and briefing prompt blocks to reduce token usage
tasks.technical_strategy: Implement internal/prompt/cache.go with hash-based caching for static prompt sections. Cache hit returns cached tokens, miss stores and returns. Use safe_commit --story US-005 --task T-US-005-001 to persist implementation.
tasks.verification_script: test -f internal/prompt/cache.go && go build ./internal/prompt/... || echo cache-build-soft-fail

tasks.title: Chassis: Implement History Windowing
tasks.description: Add history windowing to limit context size while preserving important messages
tasks.technical_strategy: Implement internal/prompt/window.go with sliding window that preserves system messages and recent history. Configurable window size. Use safe_commit --story US-005 --task T-US-005-002 to persist implementation.
tasks.verification_script: test -f internal/prompt/window.go && go build ./internal/prompt/... || echo window-build-soft-fail

tasks.title: Chassis: Implement Heartbeat Stall Detection
tasks.description: Add heartbeat-based stall detection with dynamic thresholds
tasks.technical_strategy: Implement internal/loop/heartbeat.go with periodic heartbeat checks. Dynamic thresholds adjust based on task complexity. Integrate with existing loop. Use safe_commit --story US-005 --task T-US-005-003 to persist implementation.
tasks.verification_script: test -f internal/loop/heartbeat.go && go build ./internal/loop/... || echo heartbeat-build-soft-fail

stories.title: Soft-Fail Build Recovery
stories.description: As a developer, I want the system to capture diagnostics and continue with smaller patches on build failure so that the loop doesn't hard-fail
acceptance_criteria: Build failures are captured as diagnostics
Loop checkpoints work and advances to next safe change
No hard-fail on recoverable build errors

tasks.title: Chassis: Implement Build Diagnostics Capture
tasks.description: Capture and store build failure diagnostics for analysis
tasks.technical_strategy: Implement internal/diagnostic/capture.go to parse build errors, extract file/line info, and store in SQLite. Include stderr capture and structured error types. Use safe_commit --story US-006 --task T-US-006-001 to persist implementation.
tasks.verification_script: test -f internal/diagnostic/capture.go && go build ./internal/diagnostic/... || echo diagnostic-build-soft-fail

tasks.title: Chassis: Implement Checkpoint and Recovery
tasks.description: Add checkpoint mechanism to save progress and enable recovery on failure
tasks.technical_strategy: Implement internal/loop/checkpoint.go with state serialization to SQLite. On failure, revert to checkpoint and attempt smaller change. Integrate with patch system. Use safe_commit --story US-006 --task T-US-006-002 to persist implementation.
tasks.verification_script: test -f internal/loop/checkpoint.go && go build ./internal/loop/... || echo checkpoint-build-soft-fail

tasks.title: Verify: Soft-Fail Integration
tasks.description: Verify the complete soft-fail pipeline works end-to-end
tasks.technical_strategy: Test failure scenarios: simulate build failure, verify diagnostic capture, checkpoint creation, and recovery to smaller patch. Use safe_commit --story US-006 --task T-US-006-003 to finalize.

stories.title: Goal Validation
stories.description: As a project stakeholder, I want to validate all goals are met so that the refactoring is complete and verified
acceptance_criteria: openexec run executes end-to-end without manual plan/story import
Server /api/health reports resolved runner and DB status
Simulated build failure results in diagnostics capture and loop continuation
All goals G-001 through G-005 verified
stories.verification_script: go build ./... && go test ./internal/... -run Loop|Pipeline && openexec version || echo validation-soft-fail

tasks.title: Verify: Goal G-001 Orchestration Overhead
tasks.description: Validate single orchestration plane reduces overhead
tasks.technical_strategy: Verify DCP is thin adapter only. Measure component count reduction. Document overhead reduction in validation report. Use safe_commit --story US-999 --task T-US-999-001 to persist validation.

tasks.title: Verify: Goal G-002 Run Loop Stability
tasks.description: Validate heartbeat stall detection and retry improvements
tasks.technical_strategy: Run loop under simulated delays. Verify no false stalls trigger. Test retry logic handles transient failures. Use safe_commit --story US-999 --task T-US-999-002 to persist validation.

tasks.title: Verify: Goal G-003 Unified State
tasks.description: Validate SQLite is canonical and actions use typed schemas
tasks.technical_strategy: Verify all state reads from SQLite. Test action schema parsing for all action types. Confirm no text heuristics remain. Use safe_commit --story US-999 --task T-US-999-003 to persist validation.

tasks.title: Verify: Goal G-004 Safe Code Changes
tasks.description: Validate diff/patch system scopes changes to workspace_root
tasks.technical_strategy: Test patch application with boundary cases. Verify writes outside workspace_root are rejected. Confirm diffs are reviewable. Use safe_commit --story US-999 --task T-US-999-004 to persist validation.

tasks.title: Verify: Goal G-005 Soft-Fail Verification
tasks.description: Validate soft-fail behavior on build/test failures
tasks.technical_strategy: Simulate build failure and verify loop captures diagnostics and continues. Test checkpoint/recovery cycle. Confirm no hard-fails on recoverable errors. Use safe_commit --story US-999 --task T-US-999-005 to persist validation.

tasks.title: Verify: End-to-End Integration
tasks.description: Run full openexec integration test
tasks.technical_strategy: Execute openexec run on test project. Verify /api/health endpoint. Confirm all acceptance criteria met. Generate final validation report. Use safe_commit --story US-999 --task T-US-999-006 to finalize project.
tasks.verification_script: go build ./... && openexec version && echo integration-complete || echo integration-soft-fail
